name: Predictive Discovery Limited
analysis: PDI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.8300, stop A$0.6979, target A$0.9150 (0.64:1) — then trail it.
